description: Accepted faster Scout CTF hybrid. TwodFortTwo uses a retrained learned selector packed with the refined H8 route chunk and existing H4 local finalizer. Waterway Blue Scout ReturnIntel keeps the distilled one-tick MLP return head.

rejected_experiments.reason: Single learned hierarchical chunk model preserved attack and Waterway but failed TwodFortTwo ReturnIntel/full score by overgeneralizing the route chunk and getting pinned at the first Twod wall.

result: 6/6 strict Scout CTF slice with replay disabled and policy overrides disabled. Versus the previous refined packed hybrid, TwodFortTwo return improves from tick 1282 to 1236 and TwodFortTwo full score improves from tick 1899 to 1853. Waterway remains at return tick 782/full tick 1596.
